Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted Based On Code Section 2033.280
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty Aimee E. Kirby of Dolan Law Firm T: 415.421.2800 for Plaintiff; Vanessa Carias T: 415.595.8414 Defendant in Pro Per; no other appearances.

RULING - ARGUED, PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER DOLAN, DOLAN LAW FIRM, PC Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 28, 2019 at 9:00am in Dept. 302 (for email hearing per JPT THOMAS A. COHEN). Ms. CARIAS has 10 days to provide verified responses to Plaintiff. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Thomas A. Cohen; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (JPT/302).

Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendant Vanessa Carias Based On Code Sections 2030.300, 2031.310, 2033.230, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Request For Sactions Against Defendant Vanessa Carias In The Amount Of $6,500.00, Declaration Of Aimee E. Kirby
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER DOLAN AND DOLAN LAW FIRM, PC'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses From Defendant Vanessa Carias Based On Code Sections 2030.300, 2031.310, 2033.230; Request For Sactions Against Defendant Vanessa Carias In The Amount Of $6,500.00.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
The motion is unopposed and is granted in its entirety except that sanctions are awarded in the amount of $2500.

Plaintiffs' counsel to prepare a proposed order and submit the proposed order by e-mail to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted Based On Code Section 2033.280, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Request For Sanction Against Defendant Vanessa Carias In The Amount Of $6,500.00, And Declaration Of Aimee E. Kirby
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS CHRISTOPHER DOLAN AND DOLAN LAW FIRM, PC'S Motion To Have Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted Based On Code Section 2033.280; Request For Sanction Against Defendant Vanessa Carias In The Amount Of $6,500.00.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion is unopposed and would be granted except that the moving papers do not include the requests for admission which are the subject of the motion nor the extension letter described in the moving papers. The motion will be denied without prejudice to renewal or re-notice with corrected moving papers.

Plaintiffs' counsel to prepare a proposed order and submit the proposed order by e-mail to jameshfleming@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
